devnet_progress.highlight: DevNet 7 implementations in progress; Teku branch complete, merging to master
PR #5442 (attestation participation bug fix) targets DevNet 8 inclusion

stable_containers_performance.highlight: Teku stable containers: 1.5–2x slower than non-progressive; optimization round planned
Lodestar POC with optimizations achieves ~20% slowdown vs. non-stable containers

spec_prs.highlight: PR #5442: bug fix in get_attestation_participation_flags for skip-slot reward miscalculation
PR #5443: gossip validation check — dependent root proposer preference backport to natural language spec
Potuz: reject condition in #5443 is correct, but an ignore condition (dependent root absent from fork-choice tree) would filter more bad messages from lagging clients

action_items.action: Review and approve consensus-specs PRs #5442 and #5443
Open PR on top of #5443 adding ignore condition for dependent root not in fork-choice tree
Leave comment on issue #5399 / PR #5442 so Sproul can respond to design concerns

decisions.decision: Skip-slot head reward behavior kept as originally designed (attestations across gaps fail head reward); no spec change to reward propagation semantics

targets.target: PRs #5442 and #5443 to be included in DevNet 8 (if DevNet 8 proceeds)
